name: Voss
bio: Quiet. Watchful. Has been at this table longer than the bar has been open.
tells: Voss's eyes flick to the door for a fraction of a second.
Voss straightens almost imperceptibly.
Not a tell. Voss gives nothing.
loseDialogue: Voss says nothing. That's almost worse.
bustDialogue: A single exhale through the nose. That's all you get.

gossipDialogue.dock_gossip_1: "Ship's been in impound since the Civic purge. Six years. Nobody touches it." Voss returns to their cards.
gossipDialogue.wake_hint_1: "Whoever owned that ship in berth nine — they either ran or they're in the civic body disposal queue." Voss deals without looking up.

name: Mira Que
bio: Dockworker, second shift. Gambling to forget the debt. Mostly succeeding at the forgetting part.
tells: Mira Que taps the table twice with one finger.
Mira Que glances at her credits.
Mira Que exhales slowly.
winDialogue: "Oh! Oh, okay!" Mira seems surprised every time.
loseDialogue: "Yeah. Yeah, that tracks." She pushes her chips over.

name: Drek
bio: He bets big. He loses big. He laughs either way. The table is more fun when Drek shows up.
tells: Drek grins. He always grins. It means nothing.
Drek cracks his knuckles.
"Let's make it interesting," Drek says to no one.
winDialogue: "HA!" Drek slams the table with one fist. The drinks jump.
loseDialogue: "Worth it," Drek declares, pushing chips with both hands.

name: Kael Drin
bio: Licensed pilot. Unlicensed hustler. Claims he only plays to pass time between runs.
tells: Kael Drin checks his cards twice. Just twice.
Something flickers in Kael's expression — gone before you can name it.
Kael tilts his head a few degrees to the left.
winDialogue: "Good run," Kael says, like it was never in doubt.
loseDialogue: "You're better than you look." It sounds like a compliment.
bustDialogue: "Hm." A single syllable. Then he resets.

gossipDialogue.wake_hint_1: "Wake's been impounded since before I got my license," Kael says idly. "Whoever owned it either ran or got buried."

name: Commander Vask (Off Duty)
bio: Out of uniform. Uncomfortably good at cards. Knows more than she says, which is already a lot.
tells: Vask sets her cards face-down with absolute precision.
A pause — half a second — before she bets.
Vask doesn't look at her cards again. She already knows them.
winDialogue: "Discipline," Vask says quietly. "At the table and off it."
loseDialogue: "Acceptable," she says, which means it isn't.
bustDialogue: Vask says nothing. She marks something mentally and moves on.

gossipDialogue.impound_hint_1: "The ship in berth nine is technically still registered to a living owner," Vask says, watching your face. "Technically."
gossipDialogue.vask_secret_1: After the hand, Vask leans forward slightly. "If someone wanted to make a legitimate claim on that vessel — quietly — I might be persuaded to expedite the process."

name: Rel
bio: Runs a crew in Ember Hollow. Respects two things: a good bet and someone who doesn't flinch.
tells: Rel leans back in his chair.
Rel drums his fingers — three taps, then stops.
"You sure about that?" Rel asks, eyes on your bet.
winDialogue: "Good game," Rel says, and means it.
loseDialogue: "Huh." A pause. "Buy the next round and we're square."

gossipDialogue.ember_convoy_hint: "There's a salvage cache two ridges east," Rel says between hands. "Convoy didn't make it through the storm season. Nobody's claimed it official."

name: Del
bio: Mining surveyor. Lost two fingers to a plasma drill and most of his savings to cards. Still here.
tells: Del rubs his remaining fingers together.
Del glances at the pot, then away.
Del's jaw tightens briefly.
bustDialogue: Del puts his face in his hands for exactly three seconds.

name: Yara
bio: Came in for one drink. That was last cycle. The cards just kept being interesting.
tells: Yara laughs at something nobody said.
Yara's cards drift slightly sideways in her grip.
"Wait," Yara says, "whose turn is it?"
winDialogue: "I KNEW it," Yara says triumphantly, "I KNEW it the whole time."
loseDialogue: "That's — okay, wait, let me think about this."
bustDialogue: "That was a strategic bust," Yara announces. "Very strategic."
